narrative_feedback: The design requirements are well-structured, prioritized, and detailed, earning a score of 4 in category C2. Four high-priority requirements are identified (C3), and they are consistently objective and measurable (C4). These requirements are likely to lead to a viable solution (C5). However, the requirements are not explicitly linked to prior research (C1), and only one primary stakeholder group appears to have validated the requirements (C6). To improve, the student should explicitly link the design requirements to prior research and seek validation from more stakeholder groups. Additionally, the student could further clarify the prioritization of the requirements.
